collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `g`.*, `u`.`first_name`, `u`.`last_name`, `u`.`id` as `member_id`, (SELECT weight_kg FROM weight_logs WHERE goat_id=g.id ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_weight, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vet_visits WHERE goat_id=g.id AND is_flagged=1 AND flag_resolved_at IS NULL) as is_flagged FROM `goats` `g` LEFT JOIN `users` `u` ON `u`.`id` = `g`.`member_id` WHERE `g`.`status` = 'active' ORDER BY `g`.`tag_number` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `g`.*, `u`.`first_name`, `u`.`last_name`, `u`.`id` as `member_id`, (SELECT weight_kg FROM weight_logs WHERE goat_id=g.id ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 1) as latest_weight, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vet_visits WHERE goat_id=g.id AND is_flagged=1 AND flag_resolved_at IS NULL) as is_flagged FROM `goats` `g` LEFT JOIN `users` `u` ON `u`.`id` = `g`.`member_id` WHERE `g`.`status` = 'active' ORDER BY `g`.`tag_number` ASC
